race.comment: DRUMLARGEN (2) accounted for a maiden field over 1211m at Mt Gambier last start, finishing 1.1 lengths ahead of the nearest rival. Re-unites with Dom Tourneur who was on board last start. Capable of making it two on the trot. TENTERK (5) improved last start to finish third over 1400m at Balaklava. Ideally placed and is sure to be there at the finish. AFFAIRE VUE (11) comes here off a break of five-and-a-half months. Worth noting she filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last prep over 1200m at Murray Bridge. Yet to win first up but generally runs well with two minor placings from three tries. Makes plenty of appeal. WHATHAPPENSINVEGAS (3) scored on debut last start over 900m at Mt Gambier on March 22, finishing one length ahead of the nearest rival. Among the main hopes.
